trans.div: Renovation of YYY in the Republic of China

text.transcription: 四代顯祖考劉公>諱阿?佳城

transliterations.transliteration: sù tāi hián tsóo khó 劉 kang 諱 oo kha siânn
sei3/si3 doi6 hin2 zou2 haau2 lau4 gung1 wai5 aa2/aa3/aak3/o1 gaai1 seng4/sing4
sì dài xiǎn zǔ kǎo liú gōng huì ā jiā chéng

normalization.div: 四代顯祖考劉公>諱阿?佳城

persons.person: 四代顯祖考劉公>諱阿?城

names.name: 將「彭城」川雕刻當「劉」氏的堂號

transliterations.transliteration: ka Khìng píng tsú Liân Bīng tang
gaa1 hing3 bing2 zi2 nin4 maang6 dung1
jiā qìng bǐng zi nián mèng dōng

names.name: carving an expression of political loyalty

text.transcription: 民國七五年丙寅孟夏重修

transliterations.transliteration: Bîn-kok Tshit Ngóo liân píng 寅 bīng hē tiông siu
man4 gwok3 cat1 ng5 nin4 bing2 jan4 maang6 haa6 cung4/cung5/zung6 sau1
mínguó qī wǔ nián bǐng yín mèng xià zhòng xiū

trans.div: It was rebuilt by Bingyin and Mengxia in the 75th year of the Republic of China.

text.transcription: 六代顯祖妣劉門歐>氏田佳城

transliterations.transliteration: lio̍k tāi hián tsóo pí 劉 mn̂g au sī tshân kha Siânn
luk6 doi6 hin2 zou2 bei2 lau4 mun4 au1/au2/ngau1 si6/zi1 tin4 gaai1 seng4/sing4
liù dài xiǎn zǔ bǐ liú mén ōu shì tián jiā chéng

normalization.div: 六代顯祖妣劉門歐>氏田佳城

trans.div: Liu Menou, the descendant of the Sixth Dynasty, was born in Tian Jiacheng

persons.person: 六代顯祖妣劉門歐>氏田佳城

dates.date: 民國七五年丙寅孟夏重修

erected_bys.erected_by: 孝男 良孫 禎聰 禎祥 禎氣 曾孫 有財 光庭 育軒 玄孫 弘鈞 力平 立石

description.div: Located at the heart of the village, the temple is a meeting place for people to come and chat, smoke, drink or dance. Also, venders frequently pass by and use the loudspeakers of the temple to call for customers.

ocr.orig: 金殿宇/G/敬老敬老樹~澎湖縣珍貴老樹~/老樹是自然界的瑰寶,是生物界中的長者,是人/類所敬重的綠色襲產,老樹的保育工作不僅是對生命/的尊敬,也是對我們生存環境的保障,期待所有關心/祂的人與之享有美好生活環境,共存共榮。/老樹編號:湖西-2樹種:榕樹/樹高:10公尺 樹冠面積:384平方公尺/胸圍:3 公尺 胸徑:1.2公尺/樹齡:263年/澎湖縣政府農漁局製作 2011.08.20/E/繞/西
ocr.mod: 金殿宇/G/敬老敬老樹~澎湖縣珍貴老樹~/老樹是自然界的瑰寶,是生物界中的長者,是人/類所敬重的綠色襲產,老樹的保育工作不僅是對生命/的尊敬,也是對我們生存環境的保障,期待所有關心/祂的人與之享有美好生活環境,共存共榮。/老樹編號:湖西-2樹種:榕樹/樹高:10公尺 樹冠面積:384平方公尺/胸圍:3 公尺 胸徑:1.2公尺/樹齡:263年/澎湖縣政府農漁局製作 2011.08.20/E/繞/西

text.transcription: 萬里靖狂濤赫濯神光揚八表

normalization.div: 萬里靖狂濤赫濯神光揚8表

transliterations.transliteration: Bān Lí tsīng kông 濤 赫 濯 lān Kong iông peh piáu
maan6 lei5 zing6 kong4/kwong4 tou4 haak1/hak1 zok6 san1/san4 gwong1 joeng4 baat3 biu2
wàn lǐ jìng kuáng tāo hè zhuó shén guāng yáng bā biǎo

trans.div: Wanli Jing Kuang Tao He Zhuo Shen Guang Yang 8 Tables
Hunting on behalf of the sky

transliterations.transliteration: iânn luē 帥 hōo kíng pîng-an
jing4 naap6/noi6 seoi3/seot1 wu6 ging2 peng4/ping4 ngon1/on1
yíng nèi shuài hù jìng píng ān

trans.div: The commander in the camp protects the safety of the environment

names.name: Huxi Aimen Field At The Top Of The Hill
